## Testing checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run smoke` passes
- [ ] `npm run e2e` passes (if UI/auth/marketplace flows touched)
- [ ] Manually tested affected routes on desktop
- [ ] Manually tested affected routes on mobile width
